home.airlines_partners_description: We partner with leading domestic and international airlines to give you the best flight options.
home.payment_partners_description: We support a wide range of secure payment methods — from bank transfers and credit cards to instant internet banking.
home.secure_transaction_description: Your travel security is our top priority. We use world-class encryption and secure payment gateways to ensure your peace of mind.
home.assistance_and_support_description: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock to assist you with bookings, changes, or any travel emergencies.
home.various_payment_option_description: From ATM transfers and credit cards to instant internet banking, we offer the most flexible and convenient ways to pay for your journey.
home.ferry_partners_description: We partner with top domestic and international ferry operators for your convenience.
home.no_commitment_subtitle: No sign-ups, no accounts, no subscriptions. Just seamless, direct search and booking.
home.no_signups_desc: Skip the tedious password creation, email verification, and profile configuration. We believe in direct travel planning — enter your details, complete payment, and secure your ticket instantly.
home.zero_commitment_desc: No recurring costs, no pressure, and no subscription traps. TiketQ gives you complete freedom to search, browse, and book exactly when you need to, with no strings attached.
home.privacy_first_desc: We value your digital footprint. Your details are processed safely using industry-standard secure channels, and are used strictly to issue your flight or ferry boarding passes.
home.spam_free_desc: We despise cluttered inboxes as much as you do. We guarantee that your contact details will never be sold or used for relentless newsletters. You only get what's critical: your e-tickets.
home.ai_integration_title: Too lazy to fill out forms? Book via AI Assistant!
home.ai_integration_desc: Click the chat bubble in the bottom-right corner and book instantly with zero sign-up friction. Just type your plans like:
home.ai_integration_example_1: Flight from Batam to Jakarta tomorrow
home.ai_integration_example_2: Ferry from Batam to Singapore next Monday
